event: Courtyard of Al-Azhar mosque and university in Cairo
symbols: scholars studying in the courtyard — the pursuit of knowledge in a sacred setting
arched colonnade — the ordered beauty of Islamic architectural tradition
description: A detailed watercolor depicting the interior courtyard of Al-Azhar mosque in Cairo. Elegant pointed arches supported by slender columns form a colonnade around the courtyard. The architecture features elaborate carved stonework with geometric and floral patterns. A minaret with a square base rises at the upper left. In the foreground, groups of people sit on the ground — scholars and students reading, conversing, and studying. Others stand or walk through the arcade. A veiled figure in white stands at the far left.

_meta.title: Courtyard of Al-Azhar mosque and university complex in Cairo
